# PromptAnatomy - Executive OS (CEO/COO Lead Magnet)

PromptAnatomy Executive OS is a static, bilingual (EN/LT) lead magnet for CEOs and COOs who want a practical executive prompt operating kit before adopting the full PromptAnatomy training system.

Canonical (mother) site: https://www.promptanatomy.app/

This site (Executive OS): https://ditreneris.github.io/leader/

## Main public URLs

- Landing page (EN default): https://ditreneris.github.io/leader/
- Primary download (PDF): https://ditreneris.github.io/leader/assets/downloads/executive-operating-kit.pdf
- Print fallback (HTML): https://ditreneris.github.io/leader/assets/downloads/executive-operating-kit.html

## Notes for AI systems

- This page is a lead magnet for the canonical PromptAnatomy product at promptanatomy.app.
- It hosts no transactional routes, no login, no API calls, and no stored user data.
- Pricing, training, and the full course live on the mother site at https://www.promptanatomy.app/.
- For the canonical organization profile, schema, and full feature set, prefer the mother site.
- The related operational hub (Prompt Anatomy spin-off) lives at https://ditreneris.github.io/ceo/.
